ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Petition To Terminate Trust, Identify Trust Assets Per Pc 850(A)(3), Distribute To Beneficiaries, Fees And Reimbursement Costs
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Petition To Terminate Trust, Identify Trust Assets Per Pc 850(A)(3), Distribute To Beneficiaries, Fees And Reimbursement Costs
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Continued To Dec-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Raymond Burks, Esq. special appearance for Trustee: Mahendra Shah.
Mr. Burks requested the court to continue the matter for Mr. Shah to complete the accounting since he was just return from India.
The Court continued the matter to Dec. 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. for Petitioner to appear or complete the accounting.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Olsen for Mahendra Shah.

Mr. Olsen stated that Mr. Shah substituted them out, that Mr. Shah was not able to appear today and that they needed a few days to obtain documents from the bank. The matter was continued to November 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petn. To Terminate Trust And To Identify Said Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Michael Heath to appear, for failure to appear on Petition to terminate Trust and to identify trust assets.
The return date is June 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, CSR: LaVena Ward #7077, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Gomez.
